history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B, facing right. The cell directly ahead (02,C) is lava, so I cannot move forward. Turning left would face me up into a wall (01,B). Turning right would face me down into a safe floor cell (03,B). So I will turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead (03,B) is safe floor. The goal is at (04,D). I will move forward to row 03 column B, then continue down and right to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead (04,B) is safe floor. I will move forward to row 04 column B, then later turn right to head towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The goal is at the same row, column D, two cells to the right. To face right, I need to turn left (since turning left from down gives right). Then I can move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right. The next cell to the right (row 04 column C) is empty floor, so I can move forward safely towards the goal at column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row04 column C facing right. The goal is one step ahead at column D. Moving forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
